effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
### Approved Campaign Messaging (verbatim framework)
YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.rule_text: The approved campaign headline is a verbatim framework: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis." Use exactly as written.

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
Increase your muscle strength
Do more of the activities you love

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

rules.intent: Preserve MLR-approved product benefit claims and bullets.
rules.rule_text: Product benefits copy uses the verbatim lead-in "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" followed by the approved bullets: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love.

effect.content: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

governance.preferred_form: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rules.rule_text: Mechanism-of-action messaging uses the approved primary claim "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." with the approved alternate "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rules.rule_text: Administration messaging uses the approved claim "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."

rules.intent: Preserve approved support-program naming and offering description.
